entry.value:
{"currentConversationId":"92c2c7a9-c5bb-443e-8734-7170b3b05ffa","agentExecutionMode":"auto","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"fd020cb7-049e-4ed0-b8c0-de14ddfbd16f":{"id":"fd020cb7-049e-4ed0-b8c0-de14ddfbd16f","createdAtIso":"2025-09-26T21:08:44.477Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-09-27T09:13:34.545Z","chatHistory":[{"request_id":"b2f534ee-9d48-46fc-8ada-b14d7d0c3cf2","uuid":"fc9eef69-36e6-4994-b746-38db0b2b18c6","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1758964371612,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"25321a29-dd63-44f7-81eb-2202ac74eff4","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:13:19.650Z","request_message":"Je veux que le logo de l'application soit jelly.png","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"temp-fe-667db4f4-dd37-4a0a-96f6-e3adcd6164f8","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:13:34.545Z","request_message":"","status":"cancelled","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"a5532dc6-68e6-46c0-8541-130ea9d247cd","status":"cancelled","chatItemType":"agentic-turn-delimiter"}],"feedbackStates":{"temp-fe-676424ea-018b-4e38-9ffc-4ee1b39258db":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-667db4f4-dd37-4a0a-96f6-e3adcd6164f8":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""}},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"status":"draft"},"selectedModelId":"gpt5-responses-med-200k-v8-c4-p2-agent","requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":true,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false,"baselineTimestamp":0,"hasTitleGenerated":true},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"014535d1-0ec7-465e-86fa-5ff4ca28b1d0","name":" Tauri app logo: jelly.png ","draftActiveContextIds":["/Users/lolo/Dev/Perso/Jellyfish-taurifalse","userGuidelines","agentMemories"]},"92c2c7a9-c5bb-443e-8734-7170b3b05ffa":{"id":"92c2c7a9-c5bb-443e-8734-7170b3b05ffa","name":" Dark mode default, mobile topbar ","createdAtIso":"2025-09-27T09:21:14.662Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-09-27T10:28:28.548Z","chatHistory":[{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"ae066618-61b2-46ed-a56d-4c0575a79c99","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:22:52.657Z","request_message":"Je veux le dark mode par défaut, il faut aussi faire en sorte que la top bar soit bien intégré sur mobile, quand je scroll ça fait tache avec la barre de navigation ","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"a8424d94-df38-4a23-b531-720a01ba9ed5","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:23:14.560Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"58197ed2-2f24-476b-b711-944295a8c96b","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:23:16.500Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"c88e0428-e794-4b93-b0bf-e9b7c9ecad79","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:23:29.135Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"04efd739-43ed-478b-bc2b-29eb9b83283f","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:23:53.238Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"63a2a081-4e85-48bc-b277-a67ddbcee233","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:24:24.954Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"cee3aeee-39f1-4277-8f7b-52bf671cad52","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:24:40.329Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"5e489025-6fc5-4b41-8320-c51be984bcff","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:24:45.096Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"209174dd-3c3e-4f95-96e3-6c99ccb75eff","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:24:57.665Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"9cf93571-012a-4982-b36c-0de105ff43ef","uuid":"70e2379f-88b6-449a-bc9a-c08dac1b6cbc","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1758965115085,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"e3399557-15ca-4463-9b51-8d540ebcfe45","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:26:35.966Z","request_message":"quand notification","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"5bc5f8fc-b403-47c6-a9c5-67a55f4a4669","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:27:14.900Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"7ce0aa7f-16b3-43bd-b425-b9885eec9952","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:29:00.293Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"6069a38f-d8a3-4597-b7b7-832e07143dc0","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:29:05.651Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"9e949452-735c-4fbb-94f8-f0cb750ca8a5","uuid":"e6d991d1-a4ab-4d86-bc17-9249432582c3","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1758965115085,"toTimestamp":1758965354607,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"5bbf01f5-12b2-458c-bd5d-6007f1c38fcc","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:32:36.109Z","request_message":"ouais mais le bouton de retour est pas accessible ducoup car il est bloqué dans la barre de notification, fait des recherches sur ios 26 pour savoir comment regler ce probleme ","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"75f736b7-a337-4b32-8a51-f14c0f259cb1","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:33:04.639Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"b1ef9bcc-45e4-46a8-a377-07796742c8c2","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:33:09.443Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"7aa1e6ef-1827-4c7c-8360-6d7f86880325","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:33:23.597Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"19965671-496c-48b0-babc-ba8f9976273e","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:33:27.791Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"31ab6766-278f-446a-bd68-a7c89c9f7f8d","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:33:32.334Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"986fb82e-2f8f-40ec-b7ce-ffdaee981305","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:33:37.614Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"90e2579c-78b2-43e9-b671-f157dbcd2a53","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:33:44.903Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"14f1d2d3-aa4b-4f95-acfd-7f53003f6045","uuid":"ee4c32c4-fbb5-48ef-915f-3e191074af67","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1758965354607,"toTimestamp":1758965637672,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"2a994669-fc8c-4dec-91a6-24bd2c5b6082","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:37:15.717Z","request_message":"Au lieu d'une topbar j'aimerai avoir une bottom bar qui servira pour la navigation, je veux pas le titre de l'application je veux plus de l'avatar, juste des boutons simple pour naviguer ","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"85346419-3cf6-4338-986a-a39212da76d6","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:37:28.228Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"2d4efccb-7045-483b-ab03-d81400114d00","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:39:15.923Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"10b95178-773d-425e-bb79-6ead186e95fb","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:39:21.541Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"f218cee4-840b-4b3c-a0a4-963999c4266b","uuid":"71a29598-ce0f-4c40-a479-e5a9086975cb","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1758965637672,"toTimestamp":1758965979682,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"2cf9bb54-ea5a-465f-a5c3-6da8b4ca2954","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:40:39.153Z","request_message":"Je veuc des logos au lieu de textes ","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"22afbe77-b7dc-4ce5-a6b5-0004627bc347","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:40:47.749Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"bf6a4938-9870-44a2-beff-6c324379b2e7","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:41:21.305Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3953108d-5265-4a45-b8c1-6fc9db825ccf","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:41:32.872Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"ed2f2b9b-d05b-4173-8e42-4cc1615fb9ef","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:41:46.701Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"a33b570a-b155-4810-80c2-1fc7e88152cb","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:41:52.611Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"b9016d43-d2e0-4e11-b137-2f7391e1b908","uuid":"0d49c442-eeef-4001-a916-6ae46dc8c95c","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1758965979682,"toTimestamp":1758966119544,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"afe9086b-fe81-4323-b064-de6efc82293e","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:45:29.024Z","request_message":"Utilise plutot le composant menu bar","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"e79dad8b-b12a-4640-8a1a-d5280998c4b4","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:45:35.805Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"f5b12836-f3c3-48f8-a338-d11820e7b7ec","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:45:42.535Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"158d3407-cd80-40ac-b2f9-d2d15bf21596","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:45:45.840Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"7e2abe90-4660-4fe3-8c91-476f0575c7ac","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:45:50.335Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"bd1ff9ef-f931-4d9a-826f-d0270b65576f","timestamp":"2025-09-27T09:46:30.613Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"history-summary","summaryVersion":3,"request_id":"a32ccf45-b08b-4f85-abbe-890addec8fb8","request_message":" Conversation history between Agent(you) and the user and history of tool calls was abridged and summarized to reduce context size. Abridged conversation history: quand je scroll sur iphone on voit les films scroller dans la barre de notification src/app.html src/lib/components/TopBar.svelte npm run check ## Correction iPhone: contenu qui “défile” dans la barre de statut J’ai appliqué deux correctifs spécifiques à iOS Safari qui empêchent le contenu (les films) d’apparaître sous la barre de statut lors du scroll: 1) Le header couvre désormais la zone sûre iOS - Technique “sticky offset” iOS: on décale le header au-dessus du viewport pour que son fond remplisse la zone de statut, tout en poussant son contenu vers le bas via le safe-area. - Concrètement, top-0 devient un top négatif égal à la safe-area, et on conserve le padding-top. Extrait: ````svelte path=src/lib/components/TopBar.svelte mode=EXCERPT
```` 2) iOS utilise bien toute la surface avec les insets - J’ai ajouté viewport-fit=cover pour activer l’utilisation des safe areas, ce qui évite que Safari “découpe” le haut de page et laisse voir le contenu dans la barre de statut. Extrait: ````html path=src/app.html mode=EXCERPT ```` Rappel utile: on a déjà - Un fond plein sur mobile pour le header (translucide uniquement ≥ sm). - Les meta theme-color pour teinter la barre du navigateur et éviter l’effet de “tache”. Résultat attendu - En scrollant sur iPhone, la zone de statut reste uniformément colorée par le header, sans que la liste des films ne soit visible derrière. Souhaites-tu que je: - Force aussi la barre du bas (home indicator / safe-area-bottom) sur certaines pages avec un padding-bottom conditionné à env(safe-area-inset-bottom) pour éviter tout chevauchement avec des contrôles fixes ? - Ajuste la couleur exacte de theme-color pour coller à la variable CSS de fond (oklch) plutôt qu’un hex approximatif ? ouais mais le bouton de retour est pas accessible ducoup car il est bloqué dans la barre de notification, fait des recherches sur ios 26 pour savoir comment regler ce probleme src/lib/components/TopBar.svelte npm run check ## Problème iPhone: bouton “Retour” inaccessible Tu as raison: avec le header “collé” dans la zone de statut iOS, on doit éviter que la zone interactive empiète sur le safe area, sinon les taps en haut d’écran peuvent être ignorés. La bonne pratique iOS est: - Laisser les éléments interactifs sous la safe-area; - Remplir la safe-area par un fond non interactif (pointer-events: none); - Utiliser viewport-fit=cover et les env(safe-area-inset-…). ## Ce que j’ai changé - J’ai supprimé le “top” négatif du header et remis `top-0` pour que la zone interactive ne monte pas sous la barre de statut. - J’ai ajouté un calque d’arrière-plan non cliquable qui remplit uniquement la safe-area en haut. - J’ai déplacé le `pt-[env(safe-area-inset-top)]` sur le conteneur interne (et plus sur le header) pour que le bouton “Retour” soit toujours sous la safe-area, donc cliquable. Extraits: - src/lib/components/TopBar.svelte ````svelte path=src/lib/components/TopBar.svelte mode=EXCERPT
```` - src/app.html (déjà fait précédemment) ````html path=src/app.html mode=EXCERPT ```` ## Pourquoi ça marche sur iOS - viewport-fit=cover expose toute la surface, y compris sous la barre de statut. - env(safe-area-inset-top) permet de: - pousser le contenu cliquable sous la zone non sûre (padding-top sur le conteneur), - peindre un fond derrière la barre via un overlay non interactif (pointer-events: none), ce qui évite l’effet “on voit les films défiler dans la barre”. Réfs utiles: Apple HIG “Adhere to the screen’s safe area”, MDN env(). ## À tester - Dis-moi si le bouton “Retour” est à nouveau cliquable sur iPhone. - Si tu veux, je peux appliquer le même pattern en bas (safe-area-bottom) sur les pages avec des contrôles fixés en bas, pour éviter tout chevauchement. Au lieu d'une topbar j'aimerai avoir une bottom bar qui servira pour la navigation, je veux pas le titre de l'application je veux plus de l'avatar, juste des boutons simple pour naviguer src/routes/+layout.svelte src/routes/+page.svelte src/routes/films/[id]/+page.svelte src/routes/films/+page.svelte src/routes/series/[id]/+page.svelte src/routes/series/+page.svelte src/routes/watch/[id]/+page.svelte src/lib/components/BottomBar.svelte npm run check ## Bottom bar de navigation (mobile‑first) mise en place J’ai remplacé l’ancienne TopBar par une barre de navigation en bas, simple et sans avatar ni titre, avec des liens: - Accueil - Films - Séries Elle gère la safe‑area iOS (iPhone) pour éviter tout chevauchement avec la barre système, et j’ai ajouté le padding global pour que le contenu ne passe pas sous la barre. ### Nouveau composant - src/lib/components/BottomBar.svelte ````svelte path=src/lib/components/BottomBar.svelte mode=EXCERPT
AccueilFilmsSéries
supprimé ```` ### Vérification - svelte-check: 0 erreurs. 2 warnings a11y sans impact fonctionnel: - role="navigation" redondant sur
(peut être retiré si tu veux). -
